mnemonics: DIVAC - Data, Integer, Void, Array, Character (common primitive data type keywords)
BLISS - Boolean, Long, Int, Short, String (another set of common data types)
keyPoints: Primitive data types (int, char, boolean, etc.) store simple values directly
Reference data types (String, Arrays, Objects) store references to memory locations
All keywords are lowercase and reserved words that cannot be used as identifiers
commonMistakes: Using 'String' (reference type) with == instead of .equals() for comparison
Using keywords like 'class' or 'public' as variable names, which causes compilation errors
